channel.title: SQL injection on 0xMesbaha
channel.description: Recent content in SQL injection on 0xMesbaha

item.title: SQL Tutor challenge writeup
item.description: DCTF 2022 was held from the 15th of April Until the 17th of the month , and we have participated under the team 0xcha0s, we have managed to solve multiple challenges. this challenge was ranked easy.
